result:
Done. I marked **"Review PR #42"** (todo #5) as done.

**Why this one?** Among the 3 pending todos, there were two with "medium" priority (#5 and #7) and one with "low" priority (#4). Since #5 "Review PR #42" and #7 "Plan sprint" were tied at medium, I picked #5 because it was created first — and reviewing a PR is typically a blocker for others, making it the most impactful to complete.
